name: Spicy Cajun Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the shrimp and chop them into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the flour and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it turns golden, about 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Add the onion, green peppers, celery, and minced garlic to the saucepan. Sauté for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the shrimp and remaining ingredients (cayenne pepper, lemon juice, and water) to the saucepan.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 3 to 5 minutes, or until the shrimp are tender.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot over a bed of rice. Serves 4-6 people.
